## Checklist

- [ ] Preset registered in `src/species/index.js`
- [ ] `id` matches registry key
- [ ] Textures in `public/assets/textures/` (or procedural entry in `generate-procedural.mjs`)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Screenshot or clip attached
- [ ] No unrelated refactors
